indicators.name: large open space
indicators.rationale: The large open space lacks the privacy needed for focused solo work.

indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: There is no flat surface at sitting height suitable for placing a laptop or keyboard.

indicators.name: no ergonomic seating
indicators.rationale: There is no ergonomic seating available for prolonged use.

indicators.name: no task lighting
indicators.rationale: There is no task lighting available to reduce eye strain and provide good visibility for screen work.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The large open space lacks the privacy needed for focused work, and there is no flat personal work surface or ergonomic seating available. Additionally, there is no task lighting to reduce eye strain and provide good visibility for screen work.
